zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Joanna Dutton於1335年出生在英國英格蘭爾達頓時，她的父親Sir Thomas Dutton21歲，母親Eleanor Thornton19歲。她於1357年11月20日與John Haydock在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1390年在英國享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Joanna Dutton于1335年出生在英国英格兰爾達頓时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Dutton21岁，母亲Eleanor Thornton19岁。她于1357年11月20日与John Haydock在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1390年在英国享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

variants.name: Joannah
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joanna Dutton was born in 1335, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas Dutton, was 21 and her mother, Eleanor Thornton, was 19. She married John Haydock on 20 November 1357, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1390, in England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Joanna Dutton est née en 1335, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Dutton, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Thornton, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé John Haydock le 20 novembre 1357, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1390, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Joanna Dutton 1335 in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Dutton 21 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Thornton 19. Sie hat am 20. November 1357 in Lancashire, England John Haydock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1390 im Alter von 55 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joanna Dutton è nata il nel 1335 nel Dutton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Thomas Dutton, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Thornton, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato John Haydock il 20 novembre 1357, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1390, nel England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joanna Duttonが1335年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Duttonは21歳，母Eleanor Thorntonは19歳であった。1357年11月20日にイギリスランカシュアイアでJohn Haydockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1390年にイギリスで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joanna Dutton(이)가 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 드턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Dutton(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Thornton(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1357년 11월 20일 영국 랭카실르에서 John Haydock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1390년 영국에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joanna Dutton nasceu em 1335, em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Dutton, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Thornton, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com John Haydock em 20 de novembro de 1357, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1390, em Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Joanna Dutton родилась в 1335 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Dutton было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Thornton, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Haydock 20 ноября 1357 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1390 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Joanna Dutton nació en 1335, en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas Dutton, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Eleanor Thornton, tenía 19 años. Se casó con John Haydock el 20 de noviembre de 1357, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1390, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
